{{Infobox location
| name = Shatterspine Castle
| introduced = Dreadgod
}}

''See also: [[Shatterspine Castle Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Shatterspine Castle is an ancient, fortified structure characterized by black walls that rise into sharp peaks. Once the center of a large city that has since turned to dust, the castle served as the residence for one of the final black [[dragon]] emperors of the [[Blackflame Empire]]. This ruler was a [[Herald]] who engaged in a long-standing conflict with a [[Sage]] of the [[Path]] of the Last Oath. The resulting battles contributed to the creation of the Wastelands, an area filled with abandoned battlefields from powerful ancient figures. The [[Sage]] eventually secured victory by utilizing the [[Grand Oath Array]] to seal the [[dragon]]'s [[Remnant]] and much of his kin. While the castle was once moved a great distance by the [[Rune Queen]], it has recently been subject to significant destruction and structural failure. In more recent events, the building was lifted into the air by a [[Ruler technique]] to expose an underground chamber, and it has been used as a site for intense combat involving [[dragons]] and humans.}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|Resembling the structures found within the [[Wasteland]], Shatterspine Castle is a desert location that fell nearly a millennium ago. Originally moved by the [[Rune Queen]], the site contains a basement beneath its ruins. During a battle, the castle begins to fall apart, leaving portions of it in a state of crumbled stone. Within a dark room at the bottom of these ruins, [[Ziel]] and [[Orthos]] are located.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Shatterspine Castle]] is a place like those in the [[Wasteland]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c7">''Dreadgod'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Shatterspine Castle]] fell almost a thousand years ago.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c10">''Dreadgod'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Shatterspine Castle]] has a basement.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c13">''Dreadgod'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Shatterspine Castle]] was moved by the [[Rune Queen]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Shatterspine Castle]] is falling apart during the battle.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Orthos]] and [[Ziel]] are in a dark room of crumbled stone at the bottom of [[Shatterspine Castle]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c15">''Dreadgod'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Shatterspine Castle]] is a location where [[Ziel]] is located.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c19">''Dreadgod'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Shatterspine Castle]] is located in a desert.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c19" />}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] brought back samples of the [[Rune Queen]]'s [[madra]] from [[Shatterspine Castle]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c4">''Waybound'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] drifted into [[Shatterspine Castle]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c7">''Waybound'', chapter 7</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
[[Category:Structures]]
